title: Asuka Leaving Shinji After 4I Reverse Psychology
display_title: Asuka Leaving Shinji After 4I Reverse Psychology
wikitext:
[]: Asuka Leaving Shinji After 4I: Reverse Psychology?             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Wed Sep 04, 2013 8:57 am [Split from "3.33 Things You Noticed" . May it be the last one ever. - Monk] When Asuka berates Shinji at the end of the film when she opens his plug and then walks away, it's clearly an attempt at reverse psychology to get him out on his own right? When she sighs when walking away from the plug, the only audible sounds you hear are her footsteps and low gusts of wind, she knows Shinji isn't moving or making an attempt to leave the plug and chase after her. This is also backed up by the fact she doesn't take the survival satchel with her when she walks away, it's gotta be reverse psychology (she can't pull him out on her own after all).

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Sep 04, 2013 9:20 am I don't know. Shinji looks utterly broken even at first sight, and it was quite evident that he wasn't gonna move. But the fact we already saw him in a state of suicidal catatonia in EoE and witnessed his mental breakdown through the events of 3.0 may have biased our perception, maybe she really though that his survival instinct would make him react and move. In my opinion the movie clearly showed that she was ready to just leave him because of her anger and frustration, but after walking a little and have the time to have her head cool off, she realized that if she leave him here, he was gonna to die even if he moves later, since he doesn't have anywhere to go. Maybe she thought that she was acting as childishly as she accuses him to do, who knows? As for not taking the survival satchel, honestly it doesn't even make any sense : why would neo-NERV issue survival satchel for its pilots, especially Rei Q who is as expendable and replaceable as an empty magazine, and WILLE(who really can't afford to lose a pilot) didn't? Did Asuka's angelic infection removed the need to eat and drink or what? And yes, she can pull him out on her own, since that's exactly what she did in the movie(Shinji is as good as a potato sack barely able to stand at this point)

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 04, 2013 10:51 am ElMariachi wrote: As for not taking the survival satchel, honestly it doesn't even make any sense : why would neo-NERV issue survival satchel for its pilots, especially Rei Q who is as expendable and replaceable as an empty magazine, and WILLE(who really can't afford to lose a pilot) didn't? Did Asuka's angelic infection removed the need to eat and drink or what?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Sep 04, 2013 11:16 am She wasn't seen with the compass in her hand when she arrived at Shinji's entry plug, nor when she was briefly leaving without him, and there isn't any place in her plugsuit to store it, so the logical thing is that she took it from Shinji's backpack, and if she had one in her own entry plug, it mustn't take more than five seconds to take it an put it on, no reason for leaving it behind to go looking for Shinji five seconds earlier.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 04, 2013 11:24 am The only reasonable conclusion is that Angel Asuka has Sea of Dirac pockets.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Sep 04, 2013 11:48 am She doesn't even have pockets!

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Sep 04, 2013 12:31 pm She has other dark, bottomless hole.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Sep 04, 2013 1:45 pm ElMariachi wrote: She doesn't even have pockets!

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Sep 04, 2013 2:29 pm ElMariachi wrote: She wasn't see with the compass in her hand she arrived at Shinji's entry plug, nor when she was briefly leaving without him, and there isn't any place in her plugsuit to store it, so the logical thing is that she took it from Shinji's backpack, and if she had one in her own entry plug, it mustn't take more than five seconds to take it an put it on, no reason for leaving it behind to go looking for Shinji five seconds earlier.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 04, 2013 2:34 pm Chuckman wrote: Nature's pocket, my friend.
